cmake_minimum_required(
    VERSION 4.2.0
    FATAL_ERROR
)

project(external-cpptrace
    VERSION 1.0.4
    DESCRIPTION "Simple, portable, and self-contained stacktrace library for C++11 and newer"
    HOMEPAGE_URL "https://github.com/jeremy-rifkin/cpptrace"
)
include(ExternalProject)

set(CPPTRACE_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES OFF)
if(NOT CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES)
    set(CPPTRACE_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES ON)
endif()

list(APPEND CMAKE_ARGS
    "-DCMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX:PATH=${CMAKE_INSTALL_PREFIX}"
    "-DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE:PATH=${CMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE}"
    "-DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD=${CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED=${CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS=${CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES=${CMAKE_CXX_SCAN_FOR_MODULES}"
    "-DCMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION=${CMAKE_INTERPROCEDURAL_OPTIMIZATION}"
    "-DCMAKE_CXX_FLAGS=${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS}"
    "-DCPPTRACE_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES=${CPPTRACE_DISABLE_CXX_20_MODULES}"
    "-DCPPTRACE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE=OFF"
    "-DCPPTRACE_STD_FORMAT=ON"
    "-DBUILD_SHARED_LIBS=OFF"
)

message(STATUS "Preparing external project \"cpptrace\" with args:")
foreach(CMAKE_ARG ${CMAKE_ARGS})
    message(STATUS "-- ${CMAKE_ARG}")
endforeach()

ExternalProject_add(
    cpptrace
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/jeremy-rifkin/cpptrace.git
    GIT_TAG v1.0.4
    PREFIX cpptrace
    CMAKE_ARGS ${CMAKE_ARGS}
)
